MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 220
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2006, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, ALEJANDRO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ALEXANDER'S AUTO REPAIR $32,738.48 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,130.22 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,743.70, PLAINTIFF IN ENTITLED TO THE IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE LEASED EQUIPMENT LISTED IN THE JUDGMENT, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Continued To Aug-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 220, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Melinka/Sajja, CSR: Brenda Fields.
douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Alejandro Ramos ind/dba Alexander's Auto Repair as follows:
Principal $32,738.48
Prejudgment Interest $1,130.22
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $375.00, for a total of $36,743.70
Plaintiff is also entitled to its immediate possession of the leased equipment listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
